notes: Runs at good framerate on my Vive, which is an improvement. However, the load screens take a long time and sometimes it never returns from load screens. I played the archery game and walked around that mountain area with the dog.
title: The Lab

notes: Stutters, but is playable. All load screens take a really long time. Robot Repair doesn't work.
title: The Lab

notes: Runs but crashes often. Loading times are very long. It'll often hang on a scene change, I think this is related to video memory.
title: The Lab

notes: Loading times take a couple of minutes between scene transitions even on an SSD. A bit framey after loading in but this tends to clear up and fix itself after a couple of seconds of play. The main hub sometimes peaks at 13.2ms. Everything else seemed to run around 8ms.
title: The Lab

notes: Takes minutes to load each scene. It's CPU-bound, even with a hard drive.

notes: I don't get further than the Valve logo in 3d. After that it seems the application is stuck in loading and not responding.

notes: Loading takes upwards of 5 minutes the first time each area is accessed. This is an issue with multiple games.

notes: it will always either crash immediately or load forever.
title: The Lab

notes: Basically runs perfectly (HTC Vive, index controllers). The only issues are rather long loading times (I think still below a minute though) and once you open the dashboard the game stops working. It looks like the game pauses on opening it and never un-pauses. It renders just fine but time is stopped and the controllers are gone.
title: The Lab

notes: The issue making this unplayable was fixed in the recent SteamVR 1.7.2 beta. Stages load in less than a minute, which is a little slowly, but nothing like it was with prior SteamVR versions. It might have been that slow on Windows too, but it has been so long that I forget. Returning to the pocket universe 8 lab is quick, unlike in the past. I tried several of the experiments and they all worked well. I am rating this Platinum because I don't see any bugs here. https://github.com/ValveSoftware/SteamVR-for-Linux/issues/148
title: The Lab

notes: Even with the latest SteamVR beta, this title does not appear to be fully functional. While some of the worlds work (ie. archery, arcade machine, mountain hike, etc..), there are some that result in crashing, like robot repair.

notes: A great  showcase for VR. Works well
